audit-call.eventDescription: Charged once per audit_compose, audit_dockerfile, audit_github_actions, audit_all, or per-category check call.

list-checks.eventDescription: Charged for discovery calls to list_checks_compose, list_checks_dockerfile, list_checks_github_actions, or list_all_checks.

lookup-call.eventDescription: Charged once per call to validate_postcode, lookup_postcode, lookup_city, validate_address, or budapest_district_lookup.

bulk-call.eventDescription: Charged once per call to list_postcodes_in_county.
